title: Mo’ Chests
description: This mod added more chests to Minecraft!
body:
**This mod added more chests to Minecraft!**

## Features
1. Added chests with a variety of textures.
2. Customize the number of slots of your chests freely via the configuration file.
3. Sneak-click glass chests to quickly swap items inside with your inventory.
4. Upgrade chests by sneak-clicking them with required materials.

**Mandatory Requirement: To run this mod without issues, please install the latest version of [LDLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ldlib) beforehand!**
